name: Apiary
description: Provides your settlement with honey over time.

name: Armourer
description: Used for producing the most advanced armors.

name: Arrows Rack
description: Serves as a storage for arrows and bolts, where your Guards and Companions can fill their quivers.

name: Bakery
description: Uses flour and heat to either bake bread to ensure no one goes hungry or to craft delicious pastries that boost attributes and morale.

name: Barn
description: A solid shared storage solution for your grown goods. From grain to timber, it's here to keep your treasures safe and sound, no frills attached.

name: Basket
description: Decorative Basket.

name: Battering Ram
description: FOR TRAILER

name: Big Ballista
description: FOR TRAILER

name: Big Barn
description: Shared storage container with shelves that increase storage capacity.

name: Big House
description: A cozy building that can house up to 7 settlers and significantly affect their morale.

name: Birds Coop
description: A secure shelter for chickens and other birds, allowing breeding and housing up to 10 animals that provide valuble resources such as eggs and feathers. Animals require special feed.

name: Blacksmith
description: Used for crafting the most advanced weapons.

name: Bloomery
description: Used for smelting copper, tin and bronze ingots. Requires wood as fuel.

name: Blossomveil Bush
description: Add charm to your village with a variety of decorative structures, enhancing its beauty and creating a unique atmosphere.

name: Boar Trophy
description: Boar trophy provides renown for placing in your settlement

name: Bucket With Metal Handle
description: A Bucket With Metal Handle.

name: Butchery
description: Allows you and your settlers to refine animal carcasses obtained by hunting or slaughtering animals into yield.

name: Campfire
description: A small primitive source of heat for cooking basic foods. Requires wood to maintain the fire.

name: Campsite
description: Automates cooking for you by assigning your settlers to the Campsite.

name: Carpenter's House
description: Carpenter refines timber into sturdier planks.

name: Livestock barn
description: A sturdy enclosure for cows, pig and sheep, supporting breeding and accommodating up to 8 animals that produce milk, wool and yield on slaughtering. Animals require special feed.

name: Campfire with Cauldron
description: Campfire with a cauldron. Can cook various stews using water, herbs and a main ingredient. Requires wood to maintain the fire.

name: Charcoal Burner
description: Used for producing Charcoal by burning Logs

name: Clawfin Trophy
description: Clawfin trophy provides renown for placing in your settlement

name: Closed Barrel
description: Decorative Closed Barrel.

name: Closed Basket
description: Decorative Closed Basket.

name: Coal Burner
description: Used for producing charcoal and resin by burning logs.

name: Coin Mint
description: Mints new coins out of gold bars, allowing to produce your own currency.

name: Compost Pile
description: Used for producing fertilizer by refining burnt and spoiled food.

name: Cottage
description: Nicer version of player's house.

name: Craftsman's Nook
description: A small workshop where you can craft decorative items to make your village cozy and inviting.

name: Daru the Elderbark Shrine
description: Daru is a colossal tree whose trunk and branches resemble an ancient, gnarled oak, deeply rooted and sprawling. Its bark is a deep dark mahogany color. The most striking feature is its many faces: carved into the bark are numerous faces of different expressions and ages—some wise and serene, others stern and foreboding. These faces can shift, giving the impression that they are watching and listening, ever observant.

name: Demon Boar Trophy
description: Demon Boar trophy provides renown for placing in your settlement

name: Devannos Shrine
description: Devannos is the god of war and hunting, guiding both warriors and hunters with his divine precision. His influence ensures arrows fly true and battles are won in his honor. According to legend, Devannos taught the first hunters how to track and take down prey, his guidance so precise that even novices could not miss. He is said to have intervened in the Battle of Bloodfields, guiding arrows to secure victory for his favored warriors. Some believe Devannos walks among mortals as a silent archer, testing skills and rewarding the worthy.

name: Dice Game Spot
description: A simple dice game setup where players can roll dice on a wooden barrel.

name: Distillery
description: Refines raw produce into alcoholic beverages.

name: Dockyard
description: Allows travelling to the new land.

name: Dockyard (BIG)
description: Allows travelling to the new land.

name: Drink Stand
description: Add charm to your village with a variety of decorative structures, enhancing its beauty and creating a unique atmosphere.

name: Drying Rack
description: Used to dry out animal hide.

name: Erdana Shrine
description: Erdana, the Earth Mother, embodies the nurturing and sustaining aspects of nature. She is revered as the source of fertility, growth, and prosperity, with her influence felt in every harvest and blooming flower. Erdana is believed to share in the sufferings of her people, feeling their pain during droughts and famines. Her laughter is said to be heard in the rustling of leaves and bubbling of brooks, bringing good fortune to those who listen. Legends tell of Erdana gifting humanity with agricultural knowledge, ensuring her children would never go hungry.

name: Travel sign
description: Allows you and your animals fast traveling between two or more signs. You can't fast travel with your companions or when you are in combat. Travel at your own risk if there's foes nearby.

name: Fence
description: Simple protection of your settlement borders.

name: Fishing Camp
description: It allows your villagers to fish, of course, only if you provide them with fishing rods and baits.

name: Food Cellar
description: Food stored here spoil more slowly than in regular storage.

name: Food Sorting Bench
description: Add charm to your village with a variety of decorative structures, enhancing its beauty and creating a unique atmosphere.

name: Foraging Camp
description: Harvests plants in the area around it using Workforce. Best to place near lush areas.

name: Foraging Hut
description: Two workers can simultaneously harvest various plants and resources, increasing efficiency, while drying edibles like mushrooms and berries on forager racks.

name: Foraging Lodge
description: Allows more workers to be assigned to it, has a larger storage capacity, extends the harvesting radius, and includes racks to dry various edibles like mushrooms and berries.

name: Forester
description: Grows saplings from tree seeds to replenish forest areas.

name: Gallow
description: Decorative Gallow.

name: Game Table
description: Add charm to your village with a variety of decorative structures, enhancing its beauty and creating a unique atmosphere.

name: Gatehouse
description: Fortified gate with elevated defensive position.

name: Glassworks
description: Minerals are molten into fine glass.

name: Golden Bandedfish Trophy
description: Golden Bandedfish trophy provides renown for placing in your settlement

name: Golden Clawfin Trophy
description: Golden Clawfin trophy provides renown for placing in your settlement

name: Grain Farm
description: This can be used to farm Grain as long as the soil is suitable. Requires watering and the growing process can be sped up by using fertilizer.

name: Guard House
description: Used to store gear for guards and soldiers.

name: Guard Post
description: A sturdy, wooden structure designed for early-warning and defense.

name: Harpoon Ballista
description: FOR TRAILER

name: Herb Drying Rack
description: Add charm to your village with a variety of decorative structures, enhancing its beauty and creating a unique atmosphere.

name: Herb Hanger
description: Add charm to your village with a variety of decorative structures, enhancing its beauty and creating a unique atmosphere.

name: Herbalist's Workstation
description: Add charm to your village with a variety of decorative structures, enhancing its beauty and creating a unique atmosphere.

name: House
description: A step up from a tent. Each house can hold 4 people.

name: Housing Tent
description: This tent will provide shelter for your settlers. Can only accommodate 2 people, so build enough for everyone that might need it.

name: Hunters Camp
description: Assign your workers to hunt animals and provide you with meat, hide, and other resources.

name: Hunter's Lodge
description: Allows for hide drying, trap management, and supports several hunters working at the same time.

name: Inn
description: Allows more settlers to cook more delicious dishes, which significantly boost their attribute and morale.

name: Kranek Shrine
description: Kranek, the harbinger of death, claims the souls of the deceased, carrying them to the afterlife.

name: Laundry Hanger
description: Laundry Hanger.

name: Tanning Rack
description: Treats animal hides and furs to produce materials for crafting advanced equipment and items.

name: Library
description: A dedicated space to store books and provide a place for villagers to study and improve their skills.

name: Livestock Barn
description: Fenced in area for breeding animals that provide valuble resources.

name: Log Cutting Station
description: Add charm to your village with a variety of decorative structures, enhancing its beauty and creating a unique atmosphere.

name: Log Splitting Place
description: Add charm to your village with a variety of decorative structures, enhancing its beauty and creating a unique atmosphere.

name: Logging Camp
description: One worker can use this to cut down trees in a small area. Best to place near a dense forest.

name: Lumberjack
description: Expands storage space, allows more workers to be assigned to it, and lets them cut down trees within an increased radius.

name: Lumberjack Spot
description: Allows one worker to chop logs into wood.

name: Lumbermill
description: Allows for more assigned workers, the efficient production of planks from various types of wood, a larger storage capacity, and the ability to harvest resources from a wider radius.

name: Mangonel
description: FOR TRAILER

name: Mining Camp
description: One worker can use this to mine metal ores and stones in a small area, as well as process larger rocks into smaller chunks. For the best results, place near a metal vein.

name: Mining Hut
description: Allows both Iron Ore and Granite to be mined, more workers to be assigned to it, has a larger storage space, and mines within an increased radius.

name: Mixing Bucket
description: This structure is used for mixing various things to produce cob, animal feed, fishing bait and fertilizer.

name: Morvathis Shrine
description: Morvathis, represents the primordial void and the deepest, most unfathomable aspects of existence. As a fundamental force of creation and destruction, Morvathis embodies the concept of endless potential and the unknown. This deity is associated with the depths of the earth and the mysteries of death, but also with the emergence of new life and order from seeming nothingness. Morvathis is often depicted as an ever-changing, formless entity, reflecting the unpredictable nature of the cosmos.

name: Mud Collector
description: Used for collecting mud with a shovel.

name: Open Barrel
description: Decorative Open Barrel.

name: Outhouse
description: A place where you can get rid of items that aren't needed anymore.

name: Outpost
description: Allows to establish an outpost.

name: Palisade
description: More advanced protection of your settlement.

name: Palisade Gate
description: A simple wooden gate.

name: Palisade Tower
description: A palisade tower designed with elevated platforms to provide archers with superior visibility and optimal firing angles against approaching threats.

name: Palisade Tower with Stairs
description: A palisade tower designed with elevated platforms to provide archers with superior visibility and optimal firing angles against approaching threats.

name: Pillory
description: Decorative Pillory.

name: Pit
description: Your workers can operate both at depots above ground and underground, with underground depots depleting resources more slowly. Requires placement near mineable nodes.

name: Pit Bench
description: Decorative Pit Bench.

name: Pit Saw
description: Produces planks out of logs.

name: Cabin
description: Nicer version of your personal house.

name: Lodge
description: This lodge will provide a place to sleep along with interiors and a small garden.

name: Personal Shack
description: This shack will provide a personal place to sleep for you along with a private chest.

name: Trap
description: Primitive trap for small animals like rabbits. Could break and has limited uses.

name: Reinforced Log
description: Decorative Reinforced Log.

name: Research Desk
description: One worker can use it to research new buildings and craftables.

name: River Dock
description: Allows you to sail with Companions and bring your animals on board. You can't fast travel, when you are in combat. Travel at your own risk if there's foes nearby.

name: Scarecrow
description: Decorative Scarecrow.

name: Scarecrow With Hat
description: Decorative Scarecrow with hat.

name: Camp Chest
description: Small, shared storage where workers bring produced resources, food and other gear.

name: Speckled Spotfin Trophy
description: Speckled Spotfin trophy provides renown for placing in your settlement

name: Simple Bucket
description: Simple Bucket.

name: Simple Laundry Hanger
description: Simple Laundry Hanger.

name: Simple Workbench
description: Allows you and your settlers to craft all the armors, tools, weapons and refined materials which will be critical for the success of your settlement.

name: Single Lantern
description: Decorative Single Lantern.

name: Sleeping Bag
description: A simple bed to get through the night

name: Small Basket
description: Decorative Small Basket.

name: Small Closed Basket
description: Decorative Small Closed Basket.

name: Market
description: Allows trading with caravans and vendors from neutral settlements without sending your own.

name: Smelter
description: Used for smelting steel, iron, bronze, copper and tin ingots. Requires charcoal as fuel.

name: Furnace
description: Used for smelting iron, bronze, copper and tin ingots. Requires peat as fuel.

name: Smoking Rack campfire
description: Use this to cook more food than a typical campfire, as well as dry meat, and fish with the smoking rack. Requires wood to maintain the fire.

name: Snowpetal Bunch
description: Add charm to your village with a variety of decorative structures, enhancing its beauty and creating a unique atmosphere.

name: Spotted Gluttonfish Trophy
description: Spotted Gluttonfish trophy provides renown for placing in your settlement

name: Stag Trophy
description: Stag trophy provides renown for placing in your settlement

name: Staging Ground
description: A place for Companions to stock up on gear and food, with options to choose predefined or create custom Gear Presets and manage Food diet for your settlers.

name: Stairs with Battlements
description: A stairway offering protected access to elevated positions.

name: Stairs
description: A simple wooden stairway providing access to higher ground.

name: Stairs
description: A simple wooden stairway providing access to higher ground.

name: Stairs
description: A simple wooden stairway providing access to higher ground.

name: Standing Torch
description: Simple standing torch

name: Stockpile
description: The main shared storage where workers bring produced resources, food and other gear.

name: Stonemason's Hut
description: Stonemason turns all possible minerals in crude form into fine, shaped blocks, ready to be used in various constructions.

name: Study Corner
description: Add charm to your village with a variety of decorative structures, enhancing its beauty and creating a unique atmosphere.

name: Sturdy Bench
description: Decorative Sturdy Bench.

name: Sturdy Chair
description: Decorative Sturdy Chair.

name: Sturdy Little Bench
description: Decorative Sturdy Little Bench.

name: Sturdy Stool
description: Decorative Sturdy Stool.

name: Sunflower Patch
description: Add charm to your village with a variety of decorative structures, enhancing its beauty and creating a unique atmosphere.

name: Sunleaf Cluster
description: Add charm to your village with a variety of decorative structures, enhancing its beauty and creating a unique atmosphere.

name: Tanner's House
description: Refines animal resources.

name: Tanner's Hut
description: Used to produce high quality armors and gear out of leather.

name: Tavern
description: Settlers can cook and eat food here, which boosts their morale.

name: Sturdy Bench
description: Decorative Sturdy Bench.

name: Sturdy Bench
description: Decorative Sturdy Bench.

name: Sturdy Bench
description: Decorative Sturdy Bench.

name: Sturdy Bench
description: Decorative Sturdy Bench.

name: Test Armor Chest
description: Shared storage container with shelves that increase storage capacity.

name: Small Caravan Station
description: Allows sending caravans to deliver goods between your settlements as well as to trade with neutral villages.

name: Test Decorations Chest
description: Shared storage container with shelves that increase storage capacity.

name: Test Weapon Chest
description: Shared storage container with shelves that increase storage capacity.

name: Test Weapon Chest
description: Shared storage container with shelves that increase storage capacity.

name: Test Weapon Chest
description: Shared storage container with shelves that increase storage capacity.

name: Thresher
description: A work area where villagers process harvested wheat by threshing, separating edible grain from the straw.

name: Toolmaker
description: A workshop where various gear and refined items can be crafted.

name: Town Hall
description: The central hub of any village. Unlocks more advanced buildings, and makes you a higher threat to other factions.

name: Town House T2
description: Increases Town Capacity by 6 Population by allowing villagers to live in your town. Requires food supply to keep villagers alive.

name: Training Ground
description: Used as a space where fighters can train and improve their combat skills through sparring or shooting at targets.

name: Trappers Camp
description: A worker will collect the yields from placed animal traps and re-set them automatically as long as they're available in stock.

name: Trebuchet
description: FOR TRAILER

name: Twinebound Lantern
description: Decorative Twinebound Lantern.

name: Village Archery Range
description: Trains and equips additional ranged militia for village defense.

name: Village Belltower
description: Boosts neutral village trust and allows initiation of a rebellion by ringing the bell.

name: Village Big Drinking Stand
description: A central stand where villagers gather to refresh, fostering community bonds and increasing trust.

name: Village Cattle Pens
description: Increases prosperity by providing livestock for food and village sustainability. If the village has an Animal Merchant, it also enhances the quality of animals available for purchase, improving their attributes and overall value.

name: Village Drinking Stand
description: Give more charm to the village and earn trust of locals.

name: Village Fishing Pier
description: One of the Village Improvements that can be built in neutral villages. Increases trust with the village, and villagers can fish.

name: Village Food Sorting Bench
description: A shared space for sorting and displaying food, promoting abundance and building trust among villagers.

name: Village Game Table
description: Give more charm to the village and earn trust of locals.

name: Village Granary
description: Enhances prosperity by providing grain storage for villagers’ crops.

name: Village Herb Drying Rack
description: A drying rack for herbs, supporting remedy preparation and increasing trust through shared well-being.

name: Village Herb Garden
description: Increases prosperity, allowing villagers to grow herbs.

name: Village Herb Hanger
description: Give more charm to the village and earn trust of locals.

name: Village Herbalist's Workstation
description: An organized station for the herbalist’s craft, enhancing health practices and strengthening village trust.

name: Village Laundry Place
description: A communal place for laundry, encouraging cleanliness and reinforcing trust within the community.

name: Village Log Cutting Station
description: Give more charm to the village and earn trust of locals.

name: Village Woodcutter's Station
description: A designated area for splitting wood, supporting self-reliance and boosting trust.

name: Village Barracks
description: Trains and deploys additional heavy infantry militia for village protection.

name: Village Pallisade Wall
description: One of the Village Improvements that can be built in neutral villages. Increases trust with the village and provides village with defences against raiders.

name: Village Pallisade Wall
description: One of the Village Improvements that can be built in neutral villages. Increases trust with the village and provides village with defences against raiders.

name: Village Scout's Lookout
description: Reveals fog of war in the region under neutral village control.

name: Village Shrine
description: Creates a sacred spot for respects, fostering unity and deepening village trust.

name: Village Training Grounds
description: Recruits and trains extra light infantry militia for village defense.

name: Village Vault
description: Increases village prosperity and provides storage for villagers' goods.

name: Village Community Game Table
description: A lively spot where villagers gather to play cards and games, fostering friendships and building trust.

name: Village House
description: Offers two housing slots to attract new settlers to the neutral village.

name: Village Lantern
description: Adds light to village paths, enhancing safety and building trust among villagers.

name: Village Watchtower
description: One of the Village Improvements that can be built in neutral villages. Increases trust with the village and allows to spot Brigand parties.

name: Village Well
description: Improves prosperity, providing villagers with essential access to fresh water.

name: Vase
description: Decorative Vase.

name: Veylnor Shrine
description: Veylnor, is a deity shrouded in darkness and mystery, embodying the depths of night and the unseen forces that govern fate. This primordial god exists in the shadows, influencing events from behind a veil of obscurity. Veylnor's presence is felt in moments of uncertainty and introspection, guiding those who dare to seek truth in darkness. Legends speak of his ability to weave destinies, granting insight or confusion to those who invoke his name. He accepts offerings from mortals with a promise of protection or revelation, reminding them that not all paths are illuminated.

name: Village Gathering Spot
description: Add charm to your village with a variety of decorative structures, enhancing its beauty and creating a unique atmosphere.

name: Village Hall
description: The central hub of any village and your first big milestone that unlocks more advanced buildings, as well as making you a higher threat to other factions.

name: Warehouse
description: Shared storage building with greatly increased capacity that serves as your settlement’s central resource hub.

name: Watchtower
description: Used to monitor the strength of an incoming raid.

name: Water Collector
description: Used for gathering and storing rain water.

name: Water Mill
description: Used for producing flour from grain with the power of running water.

name: Water Station
description: Add charm to your village with a variety of decorative structures, enhancing its beauty and creating a unique atmosphere.

name: Weapon Rack
description: Serves as storage for weapons, where with a Staging Ground, your Companions can also arm themselves on command.

name: Weaver Hut
description: Used to refine raw textile materials into better quality fabrics and produce advanced clothing and armors.

name: Weaver Loom
description: Used for crafting simple textiles and gear.

name: Well
description: Allows settlers to gather fresh water whenever it's needed for the settlement.

name: Windmill
description: Used for producing flour from grain with the power of the wind.

name: Wolf Trophy
description: Wolf trophy provides renown for placing in your settlement

name: Wooden Arch Lantern
description: Decorative Wooden Arch Lantern.

name: Wooden Chair
description: Decorative Wooden Chair.

name: Palisade Wall
description: A wall made of tightly spaced logs.

name: Wooden Stool
description: Decorative Wooden Stool.

name: Palisade Wall with Battlements
description: Palisade wall with improved defensive positions.

name: Workshop
description: Used for producing better tools, gear, and ammunition.

name: Ydrassa Shrine
description: Ydrassa, goddess of water, personifies the power and mystery of water in all its forms. As a primordial sea deity, Ydrassa governs not only the oceans but also rivers, lakes, and the life-giving properties of water. This goddess is both nurturing and potentially destructive, capable of providing abundant harvests from the sea or unleashing devastating floods. Ydrassa is often associated with the cycles of tides, the depths of the oceans, and the creatures that dwell within. Legends speak of her ability to calm storms or create new landforms with the power of water.
